textByHashes.a0d99eeaafca4de94cf3e0b3dac54831689ca04d: Oi could tell you a few things about old Fenky, yeah.
textByHashes.0dcd710e3779c761584cab05853154ae438d5e3a: Once, this castle were full o' good folk - my friends. Fenky was just the castle doctor you know, to the Lord and the castle folk.
textByHashes.3ed9127e6055b1ff4f0038eee5305382edd9815e: I don't know what happened to them all, but one by one they all disappeared. When they were gone a while, I went an dug graves for 'em, in the forest.
textByHashes.ff71229bb7e14b9b5871a81ad0defbe5ddc2c398: After a while there weren't no-one left, but the Lord, Fenkenstrain, and meself.
textByHashes.f87b5d26f0d8a3e4491e71b91b84da47799b5cc4: Old Fenky sent me into the Forest to dig 'im a pit. Never said what for. Then would you believe it, someone chops me head off.
textByHashes.83a526fb4e0d005dc8d58dd7477f6b551f990cc8: Before oi kicked the bucket, you mean?
textByHashes.19014b2b373df358c210bf2c34a1b0282d0a9b4b: Don't worry yourself, I'm not worried about bein' dead. Worse things could happen, I suppose.
textByHashes.1d78b290783761bc27a441256fe857c6314ab911: One thing I do know is, there ain't no Lord of the castle anymore, 'cept for old Fenky. Makes you think a bit, don't it?
textByHashes.8e37e502f465b5bf7d92116bb11cb77821c20436: Oi was in the old 'aunted Forest to the south, diggin' a pit for moi old maaster, old Fenkenstrain, when would you believe it, someone chops me head off. Awful bad luck, weren't it?
textByHashes.d693bba12cdac6ce2b8c04cf5527d8264d0d61e6: So oi thinks to meself, I don't needs any 'ead to be gettin on with me gardenin', long as I got me hands and me spade.
textByHashes.8dc0af6d8cfd0a9d94c1b2a5aa99a9b69c719e83: No mate, you've found my head already, oi think.
textByHashes.fc9a6dbd37af41056d5c0b272e3bf882ec510a55: Well, oi s'pose oi've got 10 minutes to spare.
textByHashes.a294953129b18d8ed2e87fdd716ab883b7a7e428: Me name? It's been a moivellous long while, mate, since I had any use for such a thing as a name.
textByHashes.6ca8089af8259c22a0bc5e1024e7f3e1f3822a0d: No, no, I can't be havin' that - I'll remember in a minute-
textByHashes.400fa7e4b8e5e8f4b377f27574a95a519b925ca3: You need to head off to them Haunted Woods, mate.
textByHashes.4090e1a883103bc0d2ef6182ccdec2127fe0fa63: This is the place where I met me' maker.
textByHashes.45657688ed68482863fda3a692608d09610cf52c: Oi'm afraid you've gone well off the beaten track..
textByHashes.07a16bc3107a812181f05e63a07bc058b1b8b56c: Fare thee well - oi must return to me' garden.
textByHashes.7dd60537d8cb0d1ebbc3d46741af0211d38dc8f0: Got it right 'ere in my pocket. Here you go.
textByHashes.27a78dc7a71c6fd6bd120c38c3b86512a3587e66: A conductive mould, you say? Let me see-
textByHashes.8017987895a1b2a2a445fa0722eb5c3a3a2a6e29: There used to be a bloke 'ere, sort of an 'andyman e was. Did everything round the place - fixed what was broke, swept the chimneys and the like. He would 'ave had a mould, I imagine.
textByHashes.8c9921b7d30d27273649a15565707c5a3392acc4: E's dead, just like everyone else round 'ere ... 'cept for me.
textByHashes.06add0db5ecf2191102d52bd810bfd1da71bde39: Same as ever, mate, just getting' on with it regardless.
